creator: aragon@phat.za.net
text:
Please let this PR overwrite ports/141152.  After submitting 141152 I noticed that the port had no maintainer, so I decided to adopt it.

Attached patch does everything in ports/141152 and sets myself as the maintainer.  It also refiles this port into the x11 category where I believe it belongs - please could it be moved out of x11-toolkits?

I have also removed the LOCAL distfile mirror reference as it isn't kept up to date by chinsan@ anymore.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
